form.formComment: Resuming after a break; having raced just once last campaign finished sixth of 12 starters at Punchestown on November 22 over 3822m, 36 len behind Kitzbuhel with 75.5kg at $81. First up last campaign finished ninth of 12 runners at Punchestown on May 1 over 3319m, 26 len behind Baron Noir with 76kg at $15. Place hope only here.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming finished 12th of 19 runners at Leopardstown in the LR on February 1 over 3218m, on rain affected going; 26 len behind Bowensonfire with 71.5kg at $81. Second run from a spell finished 16th of 23 runners at Cheltenham on March 13 over 3419m, slow track; 14 len behind Wilful with 70.5kg at $41. Major player on his best figures.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Not raced for 43 days. First-up after two months finished tenth of 18 runners at Leopardstown on March 2 over 3721m, 19 len behind Dee's Lady with 69kg at $8.50. form.formComment: Returns from the paddock today. Finished off last preparation 2 in a small field at Down Royal in the LR October 31 over 3419m, 7 len behind Casheldale Lad carrying 69.5kg at $5.50.
